module simd_bit_shift.0.wasm

assert_return i64x2.shr_u v128:01000000000000000f00000000000000 i32:513 -> v128:00000000000000000700000000000000
assert_return i64x2.shr_u v128:00000000000000000f00000000000000 i32:514 -> v128:00000000000000000300000000000000
assert_return i64x2.shr_s v128:000000000000008000000080ffffffff i32:1 -> v128:00000000000000c0000000c0ffffffff
assert_return i64x2.shr_s v128:1581e97df41022111581e97df4102211 i32:2 -> v128:45607a1f3d84480445607a1f3d844804
assert_return i64x2.shr_s v128:21436587efcdab9021436587efcdab90 i32:2 -> v128:c850d9e17bf32ae4c850d9e17bf32ae4
assert_return i64x2.shr_s v128:b0a0ffeeddccbbaa0d0c0b0af0e0d0c0 i32:4 -> v128:0bfaefdecdbcabfac0b0a0000f0e0dfc
assert_return i64x2.shr_s v128:a0ffeeddccbbaaff0d0c0b0af0e0d0c0 i32:8 -> v128:ffeeddccbbaaffff0c0b0af0e0d0c0ff
assert_return i64x2.shr_s v128:01000000000000000f00000000000000 i32:16 -> v128:00000000000000000000000000000000
assert_return i64x2.shr_s v128:01000000000000000f00000000000000 i32:32 -> v128:00000000000000000000000000000000
assert_return i64x2.shr_s v128:01000000000000000f00000000000000 i32:128 -> v128:01000000000000000f00000000000000
assert_return i64x2.shr_s v128:01000000000000000f00000000000000 i32:256 -> v128:01000000000000000f00000000000000
assert_return i64x2.shr_s v128:000000000000008000000080ffffffff i32:65 -> v128:00000000000000c0000000c0ffffffff
assert_return i64x2.shr_s v128:0c000000000000000d00000000000000 i32:65 -> v128:06000000000000000600000000000000
assert_return i64x2.shr_s v128:01000000000000000f00000000000000 i32:129 -> v128:00000000000000000700000000000000
assert_return i64x2.shr_s v128:01000000000000000f00000000000000 i32:257 -> v128:00000000000000000700000000000000
assert_return i64x2.shr_s v128:01000000000000000f00000000000000 i32:513 -> v128:00000000000000000700000000000000
assert_return i64x2.shr_s v128:01000000000000000f00000000000000 i32:514 -> v128:00000000000000000300000000000000
assert_return i64x2.shl_1 v128:01000000000000000f00000000000000 -> v128:02000000000000001e00000000000000
assert_return i64x2.shr_u_64 v128:01000000000000000f00000000000000 -> v128:01000000000000000f00000000000000
assert_return i64x2.shr_s_65 v128:01000000000000000f00000000000000 -> v128:00000000000000000700000000000000
module simd_bit_shift.1.wasm
assert_return i8x16.shl-in-block () -> ()
assert_return i8x16.shr_s-in-block () -> ()
assert_return i8x16.shr_u-in-block () -> ()

assert_return i16x8.shr_s-in-block () -> ()
assert_return i16x8.shr_u-in-block () -> ()

assert_return i32x4.shr_s-in-block () -> ()
assert_return i32x4.shr_u-in-block () -> ()

assert_return i64x2.shr_u-in-block () -> ()
